message:
test(rano): add tests for PID map functions and edge cases

Increases coverage from 43.9% to 62.9% (+19%) by adding tests for:
- GetAllPIDsForPane unknown pane (now 100%)
- GetGlobalPIDMapForSession (0% → 100%)
- GetStats with empty map and mixed agent types
- getChildPIDs and getParentPID with known/nonexistent PIDs
- PaneIdentity.String variants

Remaining 0% functions (Refresh, RefreshContext) require tmux integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
